transcript.clean_text: time trial day on the uae tour just nine kilometers of it you understand out from aj man and back again well the turning point was to be a turning point perhaps of the race with a tailwind out and a headwind return this was going to be a tough course tougher than it actually looked on paper and maybe more difficult than the distance suggested well the intermediate checkpoint at the turn and some drama guaranteed how would the gc men fare well we'd have to wait for teddy pikachu but it was his teammate that set off first what a great performance it turned out to be as well pickled bjerg just outside the 10 minute mark we reckoned a podium you'd have to trim underneath that margin philip magisk he found out just how difficult life can be and with a dusty road surface because of the wind we had more of it yesterday but it still had an impact on what an impact was issued by stephen bissiger brilliance at work a team that often punches above its weight stefan bisica though when it comes to time trialling especially this kind of distance he's a man who can be in charge and today he was brilliance at work kept it smooth and indeed was spotting the course both out and back finding his minuteman along the way venturini eaten up and so indeed was to be the rest of the field what scraps would be left by the time he got here the time was amazing brilliant at work 9 43 24 seconds to the good of some very accomplished time trials have been before so what was to come well of course the world champion in pipo ghana before we even got there however we had to ponder those who were going to make an impact ya omega was definitely one of those and some were saying he should have been on the podium for the day how close would the portuguese get we're about to find out almost a lonely place out there but he won plenty of plaudits as he crossed the line second quickest with 10.05 still that 10-minute margin looked like a a bridge that would be broken by very few ghana though had other ideas tightening up his shoes he was ready to prove why he carries the world champions bands he meant business and he attacked every single one of the corners took him a while to even settle into the seat once he was there he looked majestic could he however unseat bisiga who'd sat in the hot seat for well over an hour by the time ghana took to the course some changes in the weather conditions but it didn't diminish any of the performances on the day they were marginal in the end it was all about power poise and performance ghana of course on a big stage is one of the leading men but today it was not to be his day still under the 10 minute mark however good enough for second place only well our attention started to turn to those who would be baffling it out for the general classification with adam yates teddy bear catcher of course tom dumoulin still to come how would things settle between them ahead of the climbing day to jabal jais telepacha set off in pursuit of adam yates gates himself producing an excellent time but pagatcha was out for more than that he wanted brilliance and we're kind of used to seeing it from him by the time we got to the split he was already looking amazing on the return equally so just missing out on busting the 10 minutes third quickest at that point significantly though bugatti winning 11 seconds of a cushion over adam yates heading to jabil jae east in the climbing day tomorrow visitor still sat glued to his seat nobody was getting close to his times could tom dumoulin do it well he's had a layoff from cycling it's been a lengthy one he's got his head and his body together he is of course the netherlands champion time trialist and wears those world champions bands as accented to his kit well he set off on the return and it looked very very good indeed again the 10 minute mark would be broken so few did it great to see tom dumoulin back where he needs to be amongst the very best basically though with the thumbs up and a microphone ready for the interview of the winner and he was by a margin of seven seconds over ghana thompson will have 14 seconds in arrears and of talipakacha almeida some great performances here not least jasper phillipson the sprinter who hands over the leaders jersey to guess who today's winner so bisica will carry the jersey the leaders jersey into the mountains tomorrow but what will be by the day's end as always in this race nobody knows you'll have to join us to find out you
